items.title_en: Wholesale prices unexpectedly declined 0.3% in June on big drop in gasoline
items.title_zh: 由于汽油大幅下跌，6 月份批发价格意外下降 0.3%
items.desc_en: As with consumer prices, the index benefited from easing energy costs, particularly as oil fell due to the brief pause in tensions between the U.S. and Iran.
items.desc_zh: 与消费者价格一样，该指数受益于能源成本的下降，特别是由于美国和伊朗之间的紧张局势短暂暂停导致油价下跌。

items.title_en: Stock futures rise on chip stocks bounce, encouraging inflation signs: Live updates
items.title_zh: 芯片股反弹推动股指期货上涨，通胀迹象令人鼓舞：实时更新
items.desc_en: S&P 500 futures edged higher Wednesday, led by gains in chipmakers, after a rally fueled by softer-than-expected inflation data.
items.desc_zh: 周三，标准普尔 500 指数期货小幅走高，在芯片制造商上涨的带动下，此前通胀数据疲软推动了涨势。

items.title_en: Warren Buffett on the market today: 'It's tough to find values when everybody is preferring gambling'
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特今天在市场上表示：“当每个人都喜欢赌博时，很难找到价值”
items.desc_en: The investor has been sharply critical of the stock market, one that he says is increasingly defined by speculative trading as opposed to long-term investing.
items.desc_zh: 这位投资者一直对股市持尖锐批评态度，他表示股市越来越多地被投机交易而非长期投资所定义。

items.title_en: Trump's attorney general nominee Todd Blanche faces Senate Judiciary questions
items.title_zh: 特朗普的司法部长提名人托德·布兰奇面临参议院司法部门的质询
items.desc_en: Todd Blanche previously served as a criminal defense lawyer for President Donald Trump.
items.desc_zh: 托德·布兰奇此前曾担任唐纳德·特朗普总统的刑事辩护律师。

items.title_en: IRS chief Frank Bisignano will lead Trump accounts expansion
items.title_zh: 美国国税局局长弗兰克·比西尼亚诺将领导特朗普账户扩张
items.desc_en: The Treasury Department is putting a top official in charge of the new program as it enrolls millions of families.
items.desc_zh: 财政部正在任命一名高级官员负责这项新计划，该计划将吸引数百万家庭参与。

items.title_en: Treasury yields are flat as traders weigh encouraging inflation data vs. oil rebound
items.title_zh: 由于交易员权衡令人鼓舞的通胀数据与石油反弹，美国国债收益率持平
items.desc_en: Treasury yields were edged higher as investors awaited the latest producer price inflation print for June.
items.desc_zh: 由于投资者等待 6 月份最新的生产者价格通胀数据，美国国债收益率小幅走高。

items.title_en: Goldman Sachs' Ruemmler to face House questioning on Jeffrey Epstein
items.title_zh: 高盛的鲁姆勒将接受众议院对杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的质询
items.desc_en: Kathryn Ruemmler said earlier this year she would leave Goldman Sachs at the end of June after fallout over her emails with Jeffrey Epstein.
items.desc_zh: 凯瑟琳·鲁姆勒 (Kathryn Ruemmler) 今年早些时候表示，由于与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦 (Jeffrey Epstein) 的电子邮件发生争执，她将于 6 月底离开高盛。

items.title_en: Star analyst Dan Ives forms Yorkville Ives merchant bank after leaving Wedbush
items.title_zh: 明星分析师 Dan Ives 在离开 Wedbush 后组建了 Yorkville Ives 商业银行
items.desc_en: The new firm, Yorkville Ives & Co., will combine investment banking, equity research, institutional trading and principal investing.
items.desc_zh: 新公司Yorkville Ives & Co.将把投资银行、股票研究、机构交易和本金投资结合起来。

items.title_en: Italy's Meloni suffers surprise setback in close vote on electoral reform
items.title_zh: 意大利的梅洛尼在选举改革的激烈投票中遭遇意外挫折
items.desc_en: The defeat triggered opposition calls for Meloni to resign ahead of next year's general election.
items.desc_zh: 这次失败引发反对派呼吁梅洛尼在明年大选前辞职。

items.desc_zh: 米兰、博洛尼亚和佛罗伦萨的送货骑手希望保护自己的健康和工资。

items.title_en: Iran threatens to block more trade routes as US launches fresh strikes
items.title_zh: 随着美国发动新的打击，伊朗威胁要封锁更多贸易路线
items.desc_en: US President Donald Trump vowed to strike Iran's bridges and power plants next week if the country does not return to talks.

items.title_en: Morgan Stanley is set to report second-quarter earnings — here's what the Street expects
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利将公布第二季度收益——这是华尔街的预期

items.title_en: Mortgage rates rise to highest level in nearly a year, causing homebuyers to pause
items.title_zh: 抵押贷款利率升至近一年来最高水平，导致购房者望而却步
items.desc_en: Mortgage rates moved higher last week, causing buyers to pull back, but refinancing did see small gains.
items.desc_zh: 上周抵押贷款利率走高，导致买家撤退，但再融资确实出现了小幅上涨。

items.title_en: Sierra Leone drops treason charge against ex-president over attempted coup
items.title_zh: 塞拉利昂撤销对前总统未遂政变的叛国指控
items.desc_en: Ernest Bai Koroma was arrested in 2023 after gunmen broke into an armoury and some jails, freeing inmates.
items.desc_zh: 2023 年，枪手闯入军械库和一些监狱释放囚犯，欧内斯特·拜·科罗马 (Ernest Bai Koroma) 被捕。

items.desc_zh: 封锁霍尔木兹之后，伊朗表示可能加大压力并关闭红海门户 以色列时报 霍尔木兹之后，伊朗转向红海门户作为新的压力点 路透社 How new Yemen

items.title_en: Trump pays writer E Jean Carroll $5m in damages over sexual abuse and defamation
items.title_zh: 特朗普因性虐待和诽谤向作家 E Jean Carroll 支付 500 万美元赔偿金
items.desc_en: The president had sought to delay the payment as he tried to persuade the Supreme Court to overturn the judgement.
items.desc_zh: 总统在试图说服最高法院推翻判决时试图推迟付款。

items.title_en: France showcases 500 pro-Ukraine troops at Bastille Day - Reuters
items.title_zh: 法国在巴士底日展示500名亲乌克兰军队 - 路透
items.desc_en: France showcases 500 pro-Ukraine troops at Bastille Day  ReutersEurope, Flexing Muscle in Ukraine, Is Still on Sidelines in Iran  The New York TimesBastille Day celebrations in France tempered by fear
items.desc_zh: 法国在巴士底日展示了 500 名亲乌克兰军队 路透社欧洲在乌克兰展示实力，但仍在伊朗旁观 纽约时报 法国的巴士底日庆祝活动因恐惧而缓和

items.title_en: Israeli strike on police post in north Gaza kills seven, officials say
items.title_zh: 官员称，以色列对加沙北部警察哨所的袭击造成七人死亡
items.desc_en: A senior officer in the Hamas-run police force was among those killed in the strike, which Israel's military says targeted "terrorists".
items.desc_zh: 哈马斯管理的警察部队的一名高级官员在这次袭击中丧生，以色列军方称这次袭击的目标是“恐怖分子”。

items.title_en: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
items.title_zh: 《Pokémon Go》问世 10 周年，数百万人仍在尝试捕捉它们
items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
items.desc_zh: 手机游戏所有者 Scopely 的副总裁迈克尔·斯特兰卡 (Michael Steranka) 表示，这款游戏一直致力于将人们聚集在一起。

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.title_zh: 经过几天的强烈反对后，Meta 取消了新的人工智能图像功能
items.desc_en: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。

items.title_en: Is the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake worth the 13 year wait?
items.title_zh: 《刺客信条：黑旗》重制版值得 13 年的等待吗？
items.desc_en: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.
items.desc_zh: BBC 的汤姆·格肯 (Tom Gerken) 扮演了这款备受期待的海盗游戏，该游戏已从头开始重制。

items.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets
items.title_zh: 苹果起诉 OpenAI，其员工声称窃取商业机密
items.desc_en: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”
items.desc_zh: 苹果在周五的诉讼中表示，OpenAI 新兴的硬件业务“已经烂到了核心”。

items.title_en: EU threatens Meta with fines over 'addictive' Facebook and Instagram
items.title_zh: 欧盟因 Facebook 和 Instagram 上瘾而对 Meta 进行罚款威胁
items.desc_en: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".
items.desc_zh: 监管机构表示，无限滚动等功能会导致“强迫性使用”和“不健康的习惯”。

items.title_en: Big tech must deal with scam ads under Ofcom proposals
items.title_zh: 根据 Ofcom 的提议，大型科技公司必须处理诈骗广告
items.desc_en: Ofcom says more than half of UK adults have encountered potentially fraudulent ads online.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，超过一半的英国成年人在网上遇到过潜在的欺诈性广告。

items.title_en: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
items.title_zh: “90秒制冷”——假冒移动空调席卷网络
items.desc_en: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.
items.desc_zh: ASA 表示，声称小型设备可以快速冷却房间的广告好得令人难以置信。

items.title_en: Pressure builds on Europe's biggest port to be greener
items.title_zh: 欧洲最大港口面临更加环保的压力
items.desc_en: A lawsuit demands that the Port of Rotterdam moves faster to cut its dependence on fossil fuel firms.
items.desc_zh: 一项诉讼要求鹿特丹港加快行动，减少对化石燃料公司的依赖。

items.desc_en: Ofcom has fined a slew of sites it says are failing to prevent children accessing their adult content.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 对大量网站进行了罚款，称其未能阻止儿童访问其成人内容。

items.desc_en: The tech giant said people can opt out - but privacy campaigners called it a "recipe for disaster".
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，人们可以选择退出，但隐私活动人士称这是“灾难的秘诀”。

items.desc_zh: 机器人技术日新月异，因此对于许多人来说，租用机器人是有意义的。

items.title_en: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs and shrinks Xbox in 'significant restructure'
items.title_zh: 微软在“重大重组”中裁员 4,800 人并缩小 Xbox 规模
items.desc_en: The sweeping layoffs equate to 2.1% of Microsoft's workforce, with 1,600 immediate job losses at Xbox.
items.desc_zh: 这次大规模裁员相当于微软员工总数的 2.1%，Xbox 立即失业 1,600 人。
